steps.title: Count the doublings
steps.content:
The number of cells doubles every $4$ hours. In $20$ hours, the number of doubling periods is
$$20\div4=5$$

steps.title: Apply the growth factor
steps.content:
Five doublings multiply the starting amount by $2^5$:
$$250{,}000\cdot2^5=250{,}000\cdot32=8{,}000{,}000$$
The answer is D.
